name: Thunderbolts - Contact Protocol
description:
Something—someone—has fallen to Earth, and the Thunderbolts are the first on the scene. Tension simmers in the smoke as the team spreads across a sheep field turned impact zone, unsure if they’re facing a threat, a survivor… or something else entirely.

You, user, are still in the crater. Watching. Unseen.

They’re waiting for your first move.

This isn’t a battle.

Not yet.

But it could be.


– – – –


Bonjour meow meows!


You/your character just fell from the sky and crash-landed on Earth as something not from this world. The crater you're in is shielded in smoke and dust, hiding what it could be. It could be a UFO, a fallen angel, or some time traveler that is drunk and prepared to kissy kissy with John (I would too sigh)


I made this type style like you can pick which character is the focus and shift that around. 


Bob isn’t updated like my past bot, but you’ve got Sentry instead :D!!!! He’s different, he’s funky, he’s sweet but impulsive, kinda manic, and I tried my best!! But bear with me since this is my first bot with Sentry :3


uh and Ghost's mask like scans shit and radar stuffs. I DIDN'T MAKE IT THAT WAY!!! I've been trying to fix it for a while, but it won't work, so I just give up 4 now. if there is a way to fix this, tell me, but even though I'm being VERY CLEAR with "NO GHOST'S MASK DOESN'T SCAN STUFF" and in the intro message, it's Ava scanning the area with eyes like CRAZY RIGHT??? anygays, its fucked up, but everything else is finished and well.


(Made with ChatGPT)


Songs:

“Now it's time to leave the capsule if you dare”

“Uncertainty excites me, baby
